message:
deps: downgrade gRPC for Flintlock compatibility

Flintlock requires grpc v1.64.x. Downgraded from v1.78.0 to v1.64.1
and updated genproto/googleapis/rpc to a compatible version.

🤖 Generated with [Claude Code](https://claude.com/claude-code)

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>

files.patch:
@@ -4,16 +4,19 @@ go 1.24.0
 
 toolchain go1.24.12
 
-require github.com/spf13/cobra v1.10.2
+require (
+	github.com/mattn/go-sqlite3 v1.14.33
+	github.com/spf13/cobra v1.10.2
+	google.golang.org/grpc v1.64.1
+	google.golang.org/protobuf v1.36.11
+)
 
 require (
 	github.com/inconshreveable/mousetrap v1.1.0 // indirect
-	github.com/mattn/go-sqlite3 v1.14.33 // indirect
+	github.com/liquidmetal-dev/flintlock/api v0.0.0-20251202154859-49e881a25c36 // indirect
 	github.com/spf13/pflag v1.0.9 // indirect
 	golang.org/x/net v0.47.0 // indirect
 	golang.org/x/sys v0.38.0 // indirect
 	golang.org/x/text v0.31.0 // indirect
-	google.golang.org/genproto/googleapis/rpc v0.0.0-20251029180050-ab9386a59fda // indirect
-	google.golang.org/grpc v1.78.0 // indirect
-	google.golang.org/protobuf v1.36.11 // indirect
+	google.golang.org/genproto/googleapis/rpc v0.0.0-20240318140521-94a12d6c2237 // indirect
 )
